summary: Frontend-only smoke test of A.S. Solutions static site on desktop (1920x800) and mobile (390x844). Landing page, hero CTA, nav links, service rows, gallery, contact details, WhatsApp QR, contact CTAs, footer, and mobile menu all verified. No console/runtime errors.
passed: landing-page renders at / with all sections (nav, hero, ticker, services, gallery, about, contact, footer)
nav-link-services/gallery/about/contact all present; clicking services smooth-scrolled window to Y=966
contact-address href = google maps search of 'A.S. Solution, Dombivali East, Tilak Nagar'
whatsapp-qr-card and whatsapp-qr SVG rendered (react-qr-code encodes WHATSAPP_URL -> wa.me/917738600502)
contact-cta-whatsapp -> wa.me/917738600502; contact-cta-email -> mailto:ab7854505@gmail.com — both correct
Footer contains tel:+918574971297, wa.me/917738600502 and mailto:ab7854505@gmail.com hrefs
Mobile (390x844): nav-mobile-toggle opens nav-mobile-menu; nav-mobile-link-contact scrolls to Y=9046 (contact section)
No console errors, no page errors on load or interactions
